assertions.title: Resetting or controlling other users respects tenant and role boundaries

steps.action: Probe the live runtime before re-running boundary validation
steps.expected: Actuator is reachable so runtime reset/control probes can be executed
steps.observed: `curl http://localhost:9090/actuator/health` failed with exit code 7 and HTTP code `000`, so no fresh live API probe was available in this rerun.

steps.action: Re-run the dedicated tenant-authority regression suite
steps.expected: Cross-tenant reset/control boundary cases and denial evidence pass cleanly
steps.observed: `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` still failed 3/23 tests. The suite continues to report missing `ACCESS_DENIED` audit metadata for denied privileged actions, and `control_plane_support_reset_denials_use_uniform_message_for_unknown_and_foreign_tenants` remains red.

tests.result: BUILD FAILURE; Tests run: 23, Failures: 3, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

issues: Denied privileged/reset paths still do not emit the expected `ACCESS_DENIED` audit metadata in `AuthTenantAuthorityIT`.

The support-reset denial regression still fails its uniform-contract assertion; the compared payloads only differ by dynamic `traceId` and `timestamp`, but the suite remains red and the assertion is not validation-clean.

assertions.title: Privileged auth-sensitive user actions are boundary-consistent

steps.expected: Denied privileged user actions are consistently blocked and audited across the matrix
steps.observed: The matrix still fails because `tenant_admin_cross_tenant_privileged_user_actions_are_denied_and_audited` and `admin_cannot_create_tenant_admin_user` cannot find the expected `ACCESS_DENIED` audit event metadata.

tests.result: BUILD FAILURE; Tests run: 23, Failures: 3, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

issues: Privileged-action denial auditing is still not validation-clean, so the boundary-consistency matrix remains failed.
No fresh runtime allow/deny probe was available in this rerun because the local runtime was down.

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation, consistent with mission guidance.

frictions.description: The local runtime was unavailable on `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health` during this rerun.
frictions.resolution: Used the dedicated integration suite as the available validation surface and recorded the missing live-probe evidence.

summary: Reran the failed tenant-admin boundary assertions directly in-session after the delegated flow validator failed to launch. The live runtime was unavailable, and `AuthTenantAuthorityIT` still failed 3/23 tests with missing `ACCESS_DENIED` audit metadata plus the remaining support-reset denial regression, so both assertions remain failed.
